subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-11-23
subcodes.first_line: The law of Jihad has ever been a veritable firebrand with which the Ulamas of Islam have threatened the world from time to time. In former ages its moral influence
subcodes.subjects: @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @idle fancies; lust and passion, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
